economic_notes: Six entities accounted for under modified equity method: Squiala Holdings Limited Partnership (100%), Squiala Holdings GP Inc. (100%), Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry Limited Partnership (12.4%), Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society (11.1%), Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe Limited Partnership (14.3%), Centre Creek Limited Partnership (11%). Eagle Landing Development LP land lease generates significant deferred revenue. Children's Trust Fund maintained for members under 18.
notes: Fiscal year is 2023 not 2024. Province is BC (Abbotsford area). Six government business enterprises accounted for under modified equity method totalling $20,061,978 investment value. Large deferred revenue balance of $14,582,719 primarily from Eagle Landing Development LP land lease ($14,577,635). Adopted PS 3450 Financial Instruments and PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations effective April 1, 2022 prospectively - material impact due to investment income treatment. Accumulated remeasurement losses of $407,898 on portfolio investments and foreign exchange. No long-term debt outstanding (prior year repayment of $113,907). Member support expenses jumped significantly to $3,267,016 from $393,686 in prior year. No schedule of remuneration provided. osr calculated as total revenue minus ISC funding ($3,323,073) minus other government transfers ($9,110,493) = $2,594,731.
